candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet.
Contains 'Current assets' text but is clearly not the total current assets line.
Not current assets; opposite classification.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets label.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents - Ending Balance
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance matches balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents - Beginning Balance
candidates.why: Cash balance line, but beginning balance is not the preferred balance-sheet stock measure.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Mixed/garbled label; not the clean total current liabilities line.
Not current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to non-controlling interests Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Mixed equity/liability text, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt, a core part of short-term debt.
Current lease liability; excluded by baseline STD rule.
Clean short-term borrowing line and part of financing-related current debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt excluding leases; highly suitable for STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Used the minimal non-lease debt components for STD: current portion of long-term debt excluding leases plus short-term loans. Did not use lease rows. Did not use 'LT Debt Within 1 Year' to avoid potential duplication with the current-portion line.

candidates.why: Exact taxes payable/current tax liabilities line.
Tax-related payable, but VAT is not the preferred income/current tax payable measure for TXP when income tax payables exists.

variables.notes: Preferred income tax payable over VAT payable.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE stock line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related fixed assets, but not the preferred total PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Additions to property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance-sheet PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets label.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: This is the operating cash flow line as written in column A, despite the preview showing concatenated text from the next section header.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chose the exact row label as written in column A. Although the label appears concatenated with the next section heading, the values and position indicate net cash flow from operating activities.
